headline: Eli Lilly Taps Fauna Bio AI To Expand Long Term Obesity Strategy
summary: Fauna Bio and Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) identified a new obesity drug target using AI insights from hibernating mammals. The target designation advances their existing discovery partnership focused on metabolic disease. This development adds a non GLP 1 related angle to Eli Lilly's obesity research efforts. Eli Lilly, known for its diabetes and obesity treatments, is already a central player in the fast growing weight management drug space. The new AI derived target with Fauna Bio gives the...

headline: GLP-1 drugs are changing how Americans eat. Food companies are racing to catch up
summary: For restaurants and food companies, the increasing adoption of GLP-1 drugs present both an opportunity and a threat to their businesses.

headline: Beijing courts Eli Lilly as weight-loss drug race drives $3bn China commitment
summary: Investing.com -- Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is deepening its footprint in the world’s second-largest economy, with Chinese Commerce Minister Wang Wentao expressing hope that the pharmaceutical giant will "deepen its commitment" and pursue more aggressive growth targets.
